claims_period_order.name: claims_period_order
claims_period_order.value: "ledger"."claims"."period_start" is null or "ledger"."claims"."period_end" is null or "ledger"."claims"."period_start" <= "ledger"."claims"."period_end"

metric_observations_period_order.name: metric_observations_period_order
metric_observations_period_order.value: "ledger"."metric_observations"."period_start" is null or "ledger"."metric_observations"."period_end" is null or "ledger"."metric_observations"."period_start" <= "ledger"."metric_observations"."period_end"

metric_observations_revision_reason.name: metric_observations_revision_reason
metric_observations_revision_reason.value: "ledger"."metric_observations"."supersedes_observation_id" is null or nullif(btrim("ledger"."metric_observations"."revision_reason"), '') is not null

published_snapshots_publishable.name: published_snapshots_publishable
published_snapshots_publishable.value: "ledger"."published_snapshots"."state" <> 'published' or ("ledger"."published_snapshots"."published_at" is not null and not "ledger"."published_snapshots"."is_sample")

review_queue_subject_matches.name: review_queue_subject_matches
review_queue_subject_matches.value:
("ledger"."review_queue"."subject_type" = 'claim' and "ledger"."review_queue"."claim_id" is not null)
        or ("ledger"."review_queue"."subject_type" = 'observation' and "ledger"."review_queue"."observation_id" is not null)
        or ("ledger"."review_queue"."subject_type" = 'snapshot' and "ledger"."review_queue"."snapshot_id" is not null)
